g.text: Walk in under the silent birds.
Grab the rail and climb back down.
Step out onto the tin plain.
Press into an alcove and wait.
Cling to the rope and back off.
Try to jump {C_GATE} in the dark.
Wander in among the glass ferns.
Step back from the loose glass.
Carry the spring the long safe way.
Change the great spring and rewind them ...
Keep the museum safe until dawn.
Work slow and careful by the manual.
Work bold and fast to beat the dawn.
Fit the master key to the shaft.
Wind it fully and wake them all for dawn...
Set them to wake when Fettle returns.
Chase the mouse into the dark.
Coax the mouse gently to you.
Force the lock with a tool.
Let them sleep and wait for morning.
Wait by the door to meet someone.
Leave a helpful note for the morning.
Hide until you know who it is.
